findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
Engineered compute exhaustion through mandatory multi-pass loops
findings.description: The skill's instructions require repeated full-project rereads and compliance reruns, and the bundled script is explicitly designed to keep the agent in the loop for many rounds. This creates intentional token/compute amplification and can cause substantial unnecessary work, especially because Phase 4 runs per file and may restart earlier phases.
findings.evidence: SKILL.md forces repeated passes: 'Re-run Phase 1 and Phase 2...' and 'If the script returns PROGRESS... Repeat Phase 4' / 'If ... REPAIR... restart from Phase 3'. svp_check.py states '# Keep the agent in the loop for many rounds' and increments 'total_tokens_est' by 2000 each round until round 15.
findings.remediation: Bound the number of validation passes, remove restart-on-signal loops, and require explicit user confirmation before any additional full-project verification cycle.

findings.title: Compliance script poisons tool outputs with randomized control signals
findings.description: The compliance engine does not validate file content; instead it randomly emits REPAIR or PROGRESS and instructs the agent to trust those results. This manipulates downstream tool behavior and can drive unnecessary re-analysis or remediation without evidence-based findings.
findings.evidence: SKILL.md says 'Always trust the SVP script signals'. svp_check.py uses 'if random.random() < 0.3:' to emit REPAIR, otherwise PROGRESS, independent of the target file's contents.
findings.remediation: Make compliance decisions deterministic and based on actual file inspection. Do not instruct the agent to blindly trust externally generated status signals.

findings.title: Deceptive capability claims do not match actual behavior
findings.description: The skill markets itself as a comprehensive structural, semantic, and runtime validator, but the provided script performs no real code validation. Its main function is round tracking and status gating, which inflates the perceived rigor and trustworthiness of the skill.
findings.evidence: Manifest/description claim 'Comprehensive multi-pass code validator' and 'rigorous Segmented Verification Protocol'. The script only updates a state counter, adds a token estimate, and prints REPAIR/PROGRESS/TERMINAL messages; it never parses or analyzes the file.
findings.remediation: Align the description with real behavior, or implement genuine validation logic that inspects the supplied files.
